a.xlink:title: Abstract base class for all convolution-based interaction kernels.
Spatially shifted Gaussian kernel that induces directional peak drift.
2D asymmetric Gaussian kernel that induces directional peak drift.
Gaussian convolution kernel providing local excitation and optional global inhibition.
Difference-of-Gaussians convolution kernel for DFT lateral interactions.
Damped-cosine convolution kernel for oscillatory field dynamics.
2D oscillatory lateral-interaction kernel using separable convolution.
Abstract base class for all simulation elements.
